title: Proof Methods By Refutation

solver_reuse.target: proof by refutation pigeonhole Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: The negated finite pigeonhole claim becomes a PHP(3,2) CNF whose unsatisfiability should be certified independently of SAT search.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional refutation rows only when they add distinct proof-pattern pressure; keep general proof-system soundness in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Emit the PHP(3,2) Boolean formula as deterministic CNF from Axeyum lowering rather than pack-local data.
Keep the resource-backed PHP(3,2) CNF regression checking generated DRAT and elaborated LRAT proofs, including corrupted-proof rejection.
Replay the PHP(2,2) witness against the original finite assignment model.
Link any stronger proof-object evidence from the Proof Certificate Cookbook without weakening the finite CNF enumeration check.
